texto: You must regard this deviation from your plan as part of the adventure that you sought when you decided to embark on it in the first place...Absence of certainty is its essence. People...who choose to shun the mundane must not only expect, but also enjoy and profit from surprises.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Adam Yamey sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “You must regard this deviation from your plan as part of the adventure that you sought when you d…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, historical-fiction, migration, útil em momentos de viagem e migration.

frase_original: You must regard this deviation from your plan as part of the adventure that you sought when you decided to embark on it in the first place...Absence of certainty is its essence. People...who choose to shun the mundane must not only expect, but also enjoy and profit from surprises.

texto: Stuff and nonsense: you must regard this deviationfrom your plan as part of the adventure that you soughtwhen you decided embark on it in the first place. Trueadventure does not follow well-trodden paths. Absenceof certainty is its essence. People, like you and I, whochoose to shun the mundane must not only expect, butalso enjoy and profit from surprises.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Adam Yamey: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “Stuff and nonsense: you must regard this deviationfrom your plan as part of the adventure that yo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, historical-fiction, migration pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de migration e south-africa.
